title: lycopodium selago var. patens
intro: Lycopodium selago var. patens, also known as the upright club moss or forked club moss, is a rare and lesser-known species of club moss that belongs to the genus Lycopodium, a group of small, non-vascular plants. Traditionally, Lycopodium selago var. patens has been used in herbal medicine for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with this plant include reducing swelling and pain, as well as supporting respiratory health. Lycopodium selago var. patens is often used in herbal preparations such as tinctures, infusions, and salves, although its use and availability may vary depending on the region and cultural context.
